description: Below a collapsed transit stair, the market smells like battery acid, boiled grain, and old paper money. Everyone is watching what you offer first.

options.text: Buy an overpriced vault approach pass.
Trade names until someone admits they know the gate broker.
options.locked_text: You know this is a relationship market, but you do not know which names are safe to say.
options.summary_consequence: Converted social skill into finale access.

options.text: Repair the vendor scanner in exchange for a gate favor.
options.locked_text: The scanner fault is visible, but the fix requires old-world repair confidence.
options.summary_consequence: Disabled a finale obstacle through technical favor.

options.text: Invoke an old raider debt and let the room go quiet.
options.locked_text: You can copy the threat, but nobody here owes you fear.
options.summary_consequence: Used violent reputation, with possible ending cost.
